specific_mechanism: Cameo glass: opaque white over translucent blue layers; carving the white away to reveal blue traverses null-space of design constraints
llm_application: LLM activation null-space carving: subtract from over-represented activation layers to reveal underlying task-relevant features; null-space traversal as feature exposure.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes ancient-glass-blowing null-space-traversal mapping as proposed.
